Skip to contents
jstats 0.9.80
  • Reference

Produce diagnostic plots for a binary logistic regression

dot-jst_plot_logistic_diagnostics.Rd

Internal helper called by jplot.jst_logistic() to generate diagnostic plots appropriate for binary outcomes. Unlike standard linear-regression residual plots, these are designed for the structure of a logistic model.

Usage

.jst_plot_logistic_diagnostics(model, which, n_label = 3)

Arguments

model

A fitted glm object with family = binomial.

which

Character vector of diagnostic names. Any subset of binned, roc, calibration, cooks, leverage.

n_label

Integer. Number of extreme observations to label on relevant plots. Default 3.

Value

Invisibly, a named list of ggplot objects corresponding to the requested plots. Returns NULL invisibly if ggplot2 is not available.

Details

Produces any subset of five plots: binned residuals, ROC curve, calibration plot, Cook's distance, and residuals vs leverage.

Each plot is printed to the current device. Returns the plots invisibly as a named list so callers can capture or modify them.
